# Fahad Faruqi

Type `help` or press `Tab` to explore.

## Available Commands

- `ls [path]` — list directory contents
- `cd <path>` — change directory
- `cat <file>` — display file contents
- `open <path>` — open Finder window
- `pwd` — print working directory
- `echo <text>` — display text
- `env` — display environment variables
- `history` — display command history
- `clear` — clear terminal
- `help` — display this help message

## Navigation

- `~` — home directory
- `resume/` — CV sections (experience, education, projects, toolkit)

~/resume/experience/socialode.md.content:
# Socialode — Software Engineer

**URL:** [socialode.com](https://socialode.com/)

**Role:** Software Engineer | **Location:** Remote | **Duration:** Jan 2026 – Present

Building type-safe backend infrastructure and tooling for a social platform.

## Highlights

- Built a type-safe mail package in TypeScript, including validation, templating, and delivery
- Built a CLI tool to spin up realistic test users on demand, eliminating manual data setup for QA and local dev
- Shipped the matching feature end-to-end data model, migration, and REST API
- Closed a critical auth gap by implementing full password reset — betterauth extension, mail integration, and frontend flow
- Shipped dynamic bio generation into the user API, turning raw interest data into personalized profiles across response formats
- Standardized account eligibility checks across protected routes with onboarding-enforcement middleware

**Tools:** TypeScript, Node.js, BetterAuth, CLI tools, REST APIs

**Skills:** Backend engineering, auth systems, developer tooling, API design

# Tobi Wealth — Principal Software Engineer

**URL:** [tobiwealth.com](https://tobiwealth.com/)

**Role:** Principal Software Engineer | **Location:** New York, NY | **Duration:** Dec 2025 – Present

Owning product-facing performance and UX quality across a modern fintech stack.

## Highlights

- Cut critical load times from roughly four seconds to near-instant by introducing targeted caching
- Fixed high-priority UX issues across SwiftUI iOS surfaces and an Express TypeScript backend
- Improved the feel of core user journeys by tightening end-to-end performance and polish

**Tools:** SwiftUI, Express, TypeScript, Caching

**Skills:** iOS development, performance optimization, UX refinement, full-stack debugging
